messages.subject: Atlas contract renewal — terms for FY27
messages.body_text: Hi Jordan, our legal team reviewed the FY27 renewal. Two asks before we sign: (1) a 99.9% uptime SLA with service credits, and (2) quarterly business reviews written into the contract. If those work, we can close by Friday. Can you confirm this week?

messages.subject: Re: Atlas contract renewal — terms for FY27
messages.body_text: Priya — good news on both. 99.9% SLA works; credits capped at 10% monthly fees. QBRs yes, first one in October. Sending the redline today. Let's close Friday.

messages.subject: Board deck — need your numbers by Thursday
messages.body_text: Jordan, the Q2 board deck is 80% done. I still need the updated ARR bridge and the hiring plan slide from you. Board meeting is Monday — can you get me both by Thursday EOD?

messages.subject: Interview request — enterprise AI adoption piece
messages.body_text: Hi Jordan, I'm writing a feature on enterprise AI adoption for TechLedger and would love 20 minutes with you next week. Would Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon work?

messages.subject: Re: Renewal pricing
messages.body_text: Thanks — approved at the quoted annual rate. Please invoice NET-30 to finance@meridianlabs.io and cc me. Appreciate the quick turnaround.
